name: bsubtilis_168_ICEBs1_integrative_conjugative_element
description: ICEBs1 — integrative conjugative element of B. subtilis 168; ~20 kb. Integrates at the 3' end of leuB-trnSL via the int gene. Encodes conjugation (conE/conG), regulators (immA, immR), and the rapI-phrI cell-cell signalling cassette.
